input.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

raw.headline: ‘I never looked back’: Why readers chose a life abroad after Brexit

winner: After Brexit, they decided to 'exit' their lives abroad and found themselves looking back at Britain with longing, wondering if they had made a 'mist'-exit.

candidates.text: Why did the British expat look over his shoulder while on vacation? Because he heard that Brexit might chase him back home!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is timely and ties well with the headline, using a pun on 'looked back' and 'Brexit chase.' It's concise and surprising, though the humor could be sharper."}

candidates.text: Why did the British expat refuse to look over his shoulder after Brexit? Because he didn't want to see 'I never looked back' in reverse!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'I never looked back' and its reverse, but it feels a bit forced and lacks specificity to the Brexit context. The humor is mild and could be more tightly tied to the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: A man, frustrated with the chaos of post-Brexit Britain, decided to take matters into his own hands. One morning, he looked back, saw the mess, and promptly moved to Ireland... in reverse.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a clever twist with 'in reverse,' but the setup is slightly confusing and the humor feels forced rather than naturally funny."}

candidates.text: After Brexit, they decided to 'exit' their lives abroad and found themselves looking back at Britain with longing, wondering if they had made a 'mist'-exit.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with wordplay on 'exit' and 'mistake,' but the setup could be tighter for maximum surprise."}

candidates.text: After Brexit, I didn't even bother turning around... I was already at Heathrow's Departures.
